Annual Community Event

Lansing Juneteenth 5K

Run/Walk/Roll

About the Lansing Juneteenth 5K

The Lansing Juneteenth 5K Run/Walk/Roll brings the community together for a meaningful 3.1-mile event at Benjamin Davis Park.

Hosted in partnership with Lansing Area Track Club and Run Tha City 517, this event celebrates freedom, fitness, and community unity.

Proceeds and donations support LATC's vision for a year-round indoor practice facility.

Event Highlights

What makes the Lansing Juneteenth 5K special.

Everyone Welcome

Runners, walkers, families, teams, strollers, and wheelchair participants are all welcome.

Benjamin Davis Park

The race starts and finishes at Benjamin Davis Park in Lansing, Michigan.

Support Youth Athletics

Proceeds and donations support LATC's planned indoor practice facility.

Community Celebration

More than a race, this is a celebration of community, history, and movement.

Event Details

Location
Benjamin Davis Park, Lansing, Michigan

When
Annually in June. Check announcements for this year's date.

Who Can Participate
Runners, walkers, families, teams, strollers, wheelchair participants. Everyone welcome.

Supporting Youth Athletics

Your participation directly supports LATC's mission and contributes to a planned indoor practice facility, year-round training, and safe youth development programs.

Hosted In Partnership

The Lansing Juneteenth 5K is brought to you by two organizations committed to building community through running.

Lansing Area Track Club

Youth track and field program serving Lansing and Mid-Michigan since 2015.

Run Tha City 517

Lansing community running group bringing people together through movement and representation.

Join Us at the Finish Line

Whether you run, walk, or roll, you are part of the community. Register interest, volunteer, or become a sponsor.

Get Involved Check Announcements

Lansing Area

Track Club

Helping youth athletes in Lansing, Michigan build speed, endurance, confidence, and discipline through track, running, and community since 2015.

Serving Lansing, East Lansing, Okemos, Holt, Waverly, Delta Township and surrounding Mid-Michigan communities.
